titleStmt.title: SII 28.125: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 125. (A.R. No. 280 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records the royal approval of the arrangement made for obliging the ūr to pay the taxes on 1 vēli and 2 mā of land gifted from out of his kāṇi by Ambāruvandai Aryaṉ Śrī-Vedavaṉapperumāṉ alias Kāliṅgarāyaṉ of Ambar-nāḍu in Uyyakkoṉḍār-vaḷanāḍu for supplying 500 jack fruits, 5000 each of mango fruits and plantain-fruits to Āḷuḍaiya-nāyaṉār. The land concerned was situated in Tirunīṟṟuchchōḻa-maṅgalam which had been seperated from (piṟintda) Māṟpaḍugai alias Aḻagiya-chōḻachcharuppēdimaṅgalam in Tituvindaḷūr-nāḍu Rājādhiraja in vaḷanāḍu. The perum-guri mahā-sabhā of Tiru-nīṟṟu-chchōḻa-maṅgalam also issued a sabhāniyōgam to attest the above arrangement. The gifted land was entrusted for management to Kūvattu-Udaya-Divākaraṉ Iḷaiya-perumāṉ alias Mādēvabhaṭṭaṉ who had kāṇi in the said ūr. The amount of the jackfruit and the types of the other fruits to be supplied was also specified. The record was attested by tiru-mandira-ōlai Neṟiyuḍaichchōḻa-mūvēndavēḷāṉ and other officials.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ § tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉālu nāḷ nūṟṟeḻu kāṅkeyarāyaṉum
tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum teṉṉavaṉ brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceyvārka
ḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat
tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu
Ampāruvantai Arayaṉ civetavaṉapperumāṉāṉa kāliṅakarāyaṉ palāppaḻamum māmpaḻamum vāḻai
p paḻamum Amutu ceyvikkaikku rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvintaḷūr nāṭṭu māṟpaṭukaiyāṉa Aḻaki
yacoḻaccaruppeti maṅkalattup piṟinta tirunīṟṟuc coḻamaṅkalattu Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattut tiru
nāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭutta nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭu māvum patiṉālāvatu mutal cantirātittavarai Ūrkkiḻ
iṟaiyiliyāy Ūrmāvinta kaṭamaikaḷ Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukkak kaṭavatāka mahāsabhā niyogamum Eḻuti
vittu Innilam Ivvūrkkāṇi Uṭaiya kūvattu Udaya divākaraṉ Iḷaiya perumāṉāṉa māteva paṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭu
Aṉupavittu Āṭṭaikku Aiññūṟu palāppaḻamum Aiyyāyiram māmpaḻamum Aiyyāyiram vāḻaippaḻamum Āka
vantatu tirumaṭaippaḷḷikku mutalāka Eṇṇavum Eṇṇumiṭattup palāppaḻam taim māsa mutal Āvaṇi māsa varaiyilum
māmpaḻam cittirai māsa mutal Āvaṇi māsavaraiyilum vāḻaippaḻam puraṭṭāti māsa mutal māci māsa varaiyilum
nāḷ viḻukkāṭukaḷile Eṇṇavum kaṭavaṉāka Ivaṉait tiṭṭum koṇṭāṉeṉṟum Ittiṭṭum mahāsabhāniyogamum
tirukkai Oṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippalāppaḻamum māmpaḻamum vāḻaippaḻamum Ippaṭi Eṇṇivittuk koṇṭu
Amutu ceytaruḷap paṇṇavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu
kāliṅkarāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvatu
Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai neṟiyuṭaic coḻa muventa veḷāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai ceti
yarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai piritikaṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cim
peṟṟarayaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Amarakoṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāṅ
keyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum prasādañ ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭiyum rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvinta
ḷur nāṭṭu māṟpaṭukaiyāṉa Aḻakiyacoḻaccaruppeti maṅkalattup piṟinta tirunīṟṟuccoḻamaṅkalattuppe
ruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyār Ivvūrp peruṅkuṟait teṉkaṇṭattu rājarājaṉ kuḷattūr Ellaikku meṟkum kāveri nī
roṭukālukku vaṭakkum civanta cevaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkuk kiḻakkum peruvaḻikkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa
nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭu māviṉāl vanta kaṭamaikaḷ Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukkac candrādityar varai Iṟaiyiliyāka Ādicaṇḍe
śvaradevar tirunāmattu Eḻuti tanta mahāsabhāniyogamum Inta mahādevabhaṭṭaṉ Innāḷ viḻukkāṭṭile tiruma
ṭaippaḷḷip paṇṭāratte palāppaḻam nāṟcāṇ cuṟṟile Irunūṟum muṉṟaraiccāṇ cuṟṟile nūṟṟaimpatum
muccāṇ cuṟṟile nūṟṟaimpatum Āka Aiñnūṟum Amutupaṭikkāna tarattile Aiyyāyiram māmpaḻamum paṭimāvukku
Okka Aiyyāyiram vāḻaippaḻamum Eṇṇit taravu koḷḷavum Iṭṭa tīṭṭum Oṭukkik kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
